## Appreciation (optional)

If this repository or the videos helped you, feel free to share a quick note or feedback.

---

## Question

What Playwright behaviour or problem would you like to understand?

Describe the scenario clearly.

---

## Expected behaviour

What did you expect Playwright to do?

---

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened?

Include logs, screenshots, or errors if relevant.

---

## Minimal example (recommended)

If possible, provide a small Playwright example that demonstrates the behaviour.

// Example test code
